understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes that instantly end the run, with only 2 attempts per level and a 50-turn budget per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a target tile to interact (e.g., remove breakable/clickable blocks 'x'); after any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or similar), reaching the goal '+', or hitting a hazard (spikes 'u'/'v' cause immediate failure). CLICK does not move the player and can open fall paths by removing blocks; UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning uses the state’s left/right landing previews and corridor scan to choose moves that create useful vertical passages while avoiding spike landings.
